policies.code_of_conduct: Acme adopts the lead company's code of conduct and ETI Base Code. All workers are recruited locally; no fees; passports remain with the worker at all times. Hours: 44/week; overtime is voluntary and capped at 12/week.
policies.anti_bribery: ISO 37001:2016 certified (cert # AB-37001-SG-2024-1182). Annual training; gifts > SGD 50 require approval. Facilitation payments are prohibited.
policies.whistleblower: EthicsPoint channel operated by Navex; independent of supplier management; reports go directly to the lead company's audit committee. 12 reports in 2025, P50 resolution 18 days.
policies.environment: ISO 14001 certified. ESRS E1-E5 disclosed annually.
policies.climate_transition: SBTi-validated 1.5°C-aligned target: -42% Scope 1+2 by 2030. Scope 3 cat. 1+11+15 measured.
policies.deforestation_due_diligence: N/A — supplier does not handle EUDR commodities.

self_assessment_answers.age_verification_policy: ID check on hire; quarterly audit of dorms by independent auditor
self_assessment_answers.wage_data_by_role: Median operator wage SGD 2,400/month (vs Anker living wage SGD 1,950); 100% above benchmark

sample_transcripts_redacted: [REDACTED:PERSON] reported [REDACTED:DATE] that the line manager required overtime on a saturday. Resolved: HR confirmed overtime was voluntary; manager warned; policy retrained.
[REDACTED:PERSON] reported dorm hot water unreliable. Resolved: boiler repaired within 5 days.

findings.description: Fire-drill log gap in May 2025; corrected; closed.

ghg_inventory.boundary: operational control, all sites in SG
